# Aditya Sinha — Revenue & Commercial Leader | GTM, Pricing & AI Analytics

> Aditya Sinha is a revenue and commercial leader with 7 years across Goldman Sachs, J.P. Morgan, Good Glamm Group, and Careem. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/adityasinha26

## About

Aditya Sinha is based in New Delhi, India. He started at Goldman Sachs on M&A transactions and now builds GTM, pricing, and AI-led commercial systems. MBA in Finance from NMIMS (2017–2019), B.Tech in Electrical Engineering from Delhi Technological University / Delhi College of Engineering (2012–2016). Honors: National Talent Search Examination (NTSE).

LinkedIn headline: Revenue & Commercial Leader | GTM Strategy · Pricing · RevOps | Ex-Goldman Sachs · JP Morgan | 13Cr/mo Savings · +15% Revenue Growth | NMIMS, DTU

## Current Role

- **Digital Analytics Manager at Careem (Nov 2025 – Present)** — United Arab Emirates
  - Incrementality A/B tests across TikTok, Meta, and Google with potential annualized burn reduction of USD 100,000
  - Growth product strategies via competitor benchmarking and marketing analytics
  - AI-led creative intelligence layer roadmap for competitor ads benchmarking

## Work Experience

- **Head of Analytics at MyGlamm · Good Glamm Group (Feb 2022 – Apr 2026)** — New Delhi, India
  - PE-backed D2C roll-up scaled to 1,000Cr+ GMV (Accel, Prosus, Warburg Pincus)
  - +15% YoY revenue growth via GTM redesign, pricing experiments, funnel optimization
  - In-house dynamic pricing: -35% discount dependency, +25% CM2 expansion
  - ML inventory placement: -75% shipment splits, ₹13Cr/month logistics savings, zero added headcount
  - In-house LLM customer support agents: +14% NPS
  - 40+ custom dashboards for leadership
  - Promoted from Business Analyst in less than a year

- **Business Analyst at MyGlamm · Good Glamm Group (Mar 2021 – Feb 2022)** — New Delhi, India
  - In-house dynamic MIS for pricing, discounting, and GMV optimization
  - Supported 10+ acquisitions (800Cr+ deal value) with VC/PE teams
  - Due diligence, brand integration, cross-platform synergies

- **Analyst — CIO & Treasury at J.P. Morgan (Mar 2020 – Mar 2021)** — Mumbai, India

- **Investment Banking Analyst at Goldman Sachs (Apr 2019 – Feb 2020)** — Bengaluru / New York
  - 75+ investor materials per quarter; automated deal reporting (~40% faster reconciliation)

## Key Skills

Pricing Strategy, Commercial Planning, Product Analysis, Applied AI, Machine Learning, LLM Applications, SQL, Python, GTM Strategy, Revenue Operations, Financial Modeling, M&A, Due Diligence
